title: hieracium caesium subsp. semicaesium
intro: Hieracium caesium subsp. semicaesium, also known as the lesser hawk's-beard or yellow hawk's-beard, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family native to Europe. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Hieracium caesium subsp. semicaesium can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be used fresh or dried for various medicinal applications.
